steps.title: Match the cubic term
steps.content:
The $x^3$ term comes from multiplying $ax$ by $7x^2$:
$$
ax\cdot7x^2=7ax^3
$$
Since the right side has $21x^3$, solve
$$
7a=21
$$
So $a=3$.

steps.title: Match the middle term
steps.content: The $x^2$ terms are $$ -abx^2+14x^2 $$ So the coefficient is $-ab+14$. Match it to $-16$: $$ -ab+14=-16 $$ Thus $ab=30$. The answer is C.
